subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and My handmaiden, thou that gazest toward Mine horizon, that soarest in the atmosphere of My love, and that clingest to the cord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی و الناظره الی افقی و الطائره فی هواء حبی و المتمسکه بحبل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @personal instructions, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
